Actions.Text: REFERRED TO HOUSING, CONSTRUCTION AND COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT

Title: Enacts the "teardown tax act"
Summary: Enacts the "teardown tax act"; establishes a dwelling unit removal surcharge on the removal of dwelling units from the residential housing market in the city of New York.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the administrative code of the city of New York, in relation to enacting the "teardown tax act"
